[Ode to Romance] For each Lightning Orb generated in battle, trigger the passive 1 extra time.
[Ode to Life and Death] Accumulated value converts into hsrmod:NewBud.
[Ode to Sky] After triggering a Frost Orb, retrieve this card from the discard pile.
[Ode to Trickery] On next play, steal 10 gold.
[Ode to Worldbearing] Upon entering Realm, and after each play of "Fate: Divine Vessel", gain 2 Strength and Beat Of Death. Realm no longer ends naturally.
[Ode to Ocean] hsrmod:Bleed damage no longer has a cap.
[Ode to Law] When Military Merit triggers, retain 1 stack.
[Ode to Time] Instead triggers the passive of all Orbs.
[Ode to Earth] Trigger the passive of all Frost Orbs.
[Ode to Ego] If it is Plasma, still return it and gain hsrmod:Obsession.
[Ode to Genesis] Add "Together, We Script Tomorrow!" to the draw pile.
A world that knows love won't be destroyed!
Cast this light upon the darkness!
The ending is as we've written!
The story of the Flame-Chase is the tide!
Trillions of memories, will turn into stars and light up the cosmos!
I converge #pLOVE into river, that will drown the tomb of #rHATRED !
A romantic ending will be penned by every beating heart!
The fury of innumerable Coreflames, consume me!
With this newborn sun, tear open the sky!
With the old sun's embers, hail the new world's dawn!
Choose a card to strengthen: if it were a curse/status, remove it, otherwise, upgrade it and remove its exhaust word.
I grant you a dawn where all stars burn to ash.
"Remembrance" makes the proud sun bloom in dazzling gold, illuminating the dark night...
The sun of "Destruction" shall never set, until it burns to nothing...
